news.headline: Cosmopolitan Shanghai Is an Uneasy Fit in China’s Narrative of Western Sins
news.summary: Shanghai’s many layers of architecture, culture and politics have made it a difficult fit for the Communist Party’s preferred narrative of Chinese victimhood and Western sins.
